docket_entries.description: JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR ALLIAUME, ANTOINE ASSIGNED TO PREMIER JUDICIAL ENFORCEMENT
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, THE JUDGMENT HAS BEEN FULLY PAID OR SATISFIED AS TO ALL JUDGMENT DEBTORS. AS TO DEFENDANT ALIPS, FRANCOIS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-14-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-14-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. COM: PAUL SLAVIT; CLERK M. SCHWARTZ-SCOTT; NOT REPORTED (506) EXHIBITS RETAINED FOR BOTH SIDES. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT.
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO DEFENDANT ALIPS, FRANCOIS
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY ASSIGNEE PREMIER JUDICIAL ENFORCEMENT AS TO DEFENDANT ALIPS, FRANCOIS

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALLIAUME, ANTOINE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALIPS, FRANCOIS $9,158.67 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,158.67
PROOF OF SERVICE OF EJ-195 NOTICE OF RENEWAL AND EJ-190 APPLICATION FOR RENEWAL. FILED BY ASSIGNEE PREMIER JUDICIAL ENFORCEMENT SERVED MAR-10-2018, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT ALIPS, FRANCOIS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00). SERVED NOV-15-2007, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ALIPS, FRANCOIS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-14-2008 - JUDGMENT. THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS RECOVERY OF 3000.00 EURO'S AT CURRENT CONVERSION RATE.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $4,497.82 ACCRUED INTEREST, $90.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT ALIPS, FRANCOIS
APPLICATION FOR RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALLIAUME, ANTOINE AS TO DEFENDANT ALIPS, FRANCOIS NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ISSUED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,588.00 FILED BY ALLIAUME, ANTOINE AS TO DEFENDANT ALIPS, FRANCOIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-14-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALLIAUME, ANTOINE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALIPS, FRANCOIS $4,463.85 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,513.85, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS RECOVERY OF 3000.00 EURO'S AT CURRENT CONVERSION RATE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF ALLIAUME, ANTOINE ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS
